summary: FQ-13P3 implements the operator-confirmed full-body-pool approach for optional player cosmetic variation, reusing the FQ-09V <id>_NN.png convention. A character-owned visual_variant int lives on the shell character record (game_state.create_character stores it; legacy characters get a stable default_visual_variant(id) = posmod(hash(id),3) so they never change appearance across loads) and is presentation-only, never written to world saves - it rides with the character between worlds. player.apply_character reads it into player.visual_variant and passes it to player_visual.set_character_visual; player_visual._select_body_texture returns art/generated/players/<body_id>_NN.png (0 = canonical, k>0 = pool[k-1] wrapped by pool size), falling back to the canonical body, then the same-species default, then the drawn rig. Masculine/Feminine stay semantic presentation, not a variant axis. scripts/gen_player_variants.py ships a 2-entry demo pool for human (human_01/human_02: an HSV garment recolor giving a blue and a green outfit, leaving skin untouched); other bodies keep empty pools and draw canonical (legal per spec). shell_ui.gd gains a 'Look' prev/next SpinBox on the creation screen that feeds visual_variant into the created character. asset_audit.py adds 'players' to VARIANT_CONSUMERS (human variants LIVE; 0 findings, 0 data bugs). Five fq13p3_* smoke checks cover distinct sprite per variant, variant 0 canonical + out-of-range wrap, no-pool fallback, character-owned and NOT a world-save key with a deterministic legacy default, and that the creation UI script compiles. Suite 291 -> 296.
scope: FQ-13P3 per the FQ-13P arc - player full-body cosmetic pool: character-owned persistent visual_variant, deterministic legacy default, variant selection with canonical/default/drawn fallback, a demo human pool, and a creation-screen prev/next control. No world-save schema change, no gameplay math.
next_action: FQ-13P4: opening manifest variant-vs-animation distinction + block/item variation follow-through, closing the FQ-13P arc. Then FQ-14.
